title: senna rostrata
intro: Senna rostrata, also known as the stick senna, is a shrub-like plant native to tropical Africa, belonging to the legume family Fabaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its cathartic and anti-inflammatory effects, which make it useful for treating constipation, fever, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Senna rostrata include its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve pain, and lower blood pressure. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or capsules, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties.
